pattern: A three-state dynamic program (flat, holding long, holding short) bounded by the transaction budget captures both ordinary buys and short sells without overlapping days.
hints: At any moment you are in one of three situations: holding nothing, mid-way through a long trade, or mid-way through a short trade.
Opening a position is free of a transaction charge; a transaction is only consumed when you close back to flat, and the budget caps how many closes you may do.

Track for each number of completed transactions the best balance while flat, while long-open, and while short-open; advance these over the days letting flat positions open either kind of trade and open positions close back to flat consuming one transaction.

edge_inputs.description: one long and one short trade
three trades mixing long and short
monotone increasing favors a single long trade
monotone decreasing favors a single short trade

stress.description: moderate length with a generous transaction budget
stress.generator_python:
def gen(rng, size):
    n = max(2, size)
    prices = [rng.randrange(1, 1000000001) for _ in range(n)]
    k = rng.randrange(1, n // 2 + 1)
    return [prices, k]
stress.note: k at most n//2 per constraints
